signals.raw:
HEADLINE:** Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Claims XRP Can Flip Ethereum in Market Cap | ANNOUNCED | MED confidence

Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse publicly argued that XRP has a realistic chance of overtaking Ethereum's market capitalization, citing its cross-border payment utility as structural foundation.[1] Standard Chartered's analysts project XRP could reach $8 by end of 2026 and $12.50 by 2028,
